%macro harmonic_mean(inds=,
                      outds=,
                      filter=,
                      byvars=,
                      avar=,
                      SDmethod=JACKKNIFE


					  )/store ;

     proc sql;
	 	create table _temp_out1_ as
	 	select %sysfunc(translate(%str(&byvars),%str(,),%str( ))), count(&avar)/sum(1/&avar) as hmean,&avar, count(&avar) as n
		from &inds
		where not missing(&avar)
		%if %str(&filter) ^=%str() %then and ( &filter);
		group by %sysfunc(translate(%

replace_excel_char10.name: replace_excel_char10
replace_excel_char10.code_snippet:
%macro replace_excel_char10(file,headerline=&headerlines)/store;
%if &headerline= %then %let headerline=2;
data _null_;
  file "vbscript.vbs";
  put "Set objExcel = CreateObject(""Excel.Application"") "
/ "objExcel.Visible = False  "

/ "set wb = objExcel.workbooks.Open(""&file"")"
/ "on error resume next"
/ "For Each MyRange In wb.Worksheets(1).UsedRange"
/ "        If 0 < InStr(MyRange, Chr(10)) and MyRange.Row>&headerline Then "
/ "		MyRange.Replace Chr(10), """" "
/ "		end if"
/ "Next"
/ "wb
